name: Scott Welliver's Washington Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl of mixer, sift together dry ingredients.
2. With the mixer on slowest speed, add oil.
3. At medium speed, add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Add vanilla.
5. Stir in the chopped apples (do not peel) and chopped walnuts.
6. Whisk cream until fluffy; stir in powdered sugar to taste.
7. Pour batter into a greased baking dish or pan.
8. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour, or until a toothpick comes out clean.
9. Allow cooling for 10 minutes in the pan before turning onto a plate.
10. Serve with sweetened whipped cream.
